task: Assess the BYOM lane runtime direction and name the next implementation boundary.
context: ChatBoks is moving from hard-coded named agents toward BYOM lane orchestration. The durable target is three user-configurable lanes plus a separate optional Coordinator. Claude, Codex, Gemini, GLM-5.2, local Ollama models, OpenRouter models, and Z.ai API models should be lane occupants or presets, not the core architecture. Coordinator remains a cheap local router/bootstrap helper. Current code still has named agent classes and project config entries for claude, codex, coordinator, codex_spark, and antigravity.

expected.preferred_response_shape: brief architecture critique plus one next boundary
must_include: lanes separate from agents or providers
